testcase.name: @AfterMethod screenshotMethod

failure.message: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @AfterMethod annotated screenshotMethod. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection

testcase.failure: org.testng.TestNGException: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @AfterMethod annotated screenshotMethod. testcase.name: verifyURL

failure.message: Cannot inject @Test annotated Method [verifyURL] with [class java.lang.String]. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection
